headline: TASK-070 is the live v6.5 frontier after 6.4.0.

current_state.operating_goal: Advance v6.5 as Execution Hygiene + Human Recognition: keep AOF runs bounded by minimal persistent context, on-demand skills/artifacts, work item session boundaries, small diffs, specialist actor composition, Council-ready handoff, approved run contracts, safe local command batching, and explicit approval for project/external/dangerous operations.
current_state.next_value_slice: After v6.4.0, advance v6.5 as Execution Hygiene + Human Recognition: preserve the rule that CLI help is routing evidence, runtime claims need executed command proof, safe local reads/writes are preapproved by run contract, and project/external/dangerous operations require per-run approval.

primary_frontier_task.title: v6.5 bridge: Codify CLI help boundary and runtime-backed evidence rule

visible_state.speech_bubble: I need council review before I should execute.
visible_state.next_action: Submit the gate packet to council review before actor execution.

why_now.summary: TASK-070 is the best current frontier because it matches the live post-release goal surface and no stronger truth conflict is active.
reasons: The active release baseline is 6.4.0 and the runtime is now targeting v6.5.
The current operating goal and next value slice both reinforce TASK-070 as the next bounded operating move.

next_action.recommended_action: Start TASK-070: v6.5 bridge: Codify CLI help boundary and runtime-backed evidence rule
next_action.rationale: This is the best open task aligned with the current operating goal and next release frontier.
